meta.title: Daniil Vdovin — Fullstack Developer
meta.description: Middle Fullstack/Backend developer specializing in Go, Node.js, and AI-powered solutions. Based in Ekaterinburg, Russia.

hero.name: Daniil Vdovin
hero.tagline: I build reliable backends and modern interfaces with Go, Node.js — powered by AI tools.

about.title: About me
about.bio:
Fullstack developer focused on Backend (Go & Node.js/NestJS). 1.5+ years of commercial experience with two parallel production projects serving real users. I write code that others can understand: modular architecture, clean abstractions, test coverage. I can work in a team, read others' code, and ask questions before writing — not after.

I use AI as a daily development tool — Claude Code CLI with custom MCP servers — it's a workflow, not an experiment. I want to grow towards complex backend systems: distributed architectures, performance, reliability.

highlights: Shipped **multiple independent production modules from scratch** — each with tests, docs and CI pipeline
Set up full observability stack (Prometheus + Grafana + Loki + OpenTelemetry): **incident detection time — minutes**
Implemented Redis caching via Decorator Pattern: **30x read speedup** with zero changes to business logic
Built 1C ERP and Telegram Bot integrations: **bidirectional data sync with zero data loss**
Claude Code (CLI) as primary AI tool: MCP servers (Serena, Context7, Playwright, Figma), **AI-driven TDD**, custom skills for debugging and code review

methodology.title: Development Methodologies
methodology.text: TDD + DDD for domain logic design: tests first, then domain objects and services. CQRS and Event Sourcing for read/write separation. RDD for feature planning. Swagger/OpenAPI documentation from Go annotations.

architecture.title: Architecture & Design
architecture.text: Modular monolith on Go: each domain encapsulated, clear boundaries. In-memory EventBus with Kafka abstraction. CQRS + Event Sourcing + Repository + Unit of Work. REST API with unified error handling and pagination.

backend.title: Backend (Go / Gin)
backend.text: Go + Gin as primary stack. Middleware chains, correlation IDs. JWT auth with refresh tokens and rotation. WebSocket: chats, group messages. Redis caching via Decorator Pattern. Bidirectional sync with 1C ERP.

frontend.title: Frontend (React / TypeScript)
frontend.text: Internal panels on Next.js with Server Components and App Router. Multilingual ru/en/fr/ar with RTL support. Reusable UI components. PWA with offline mode.

ai.title: AI Tools
ai.text: Claude Code (CLI) for architecture planning and AI-driven TDD: tests before implementation, parallel verification via subagent tasks. MCP servers: Serena, Context7, Playwright MCP. LSP plugin gopls.

devops.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
devops.text: Docker + Docker Compose, multi-stage builds. Observability from scratch: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, OpenTelemetry. Telegram alerts on CPU/RAM/Disk/API errors. CI/CD in GitHub Actions. Encrypted auto-backups.

testing.title: Testing
testing.text: testify unit tests for Go, k6 load tests. E2E with Playwright. Mocking for WebSocket and 1C API. Tests in CI/CD: PRs don't merge without passing the full test matrix.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.text: Bidirectional sync with 1C ERP: domain entity mapping, conflict handling, discrepancy logging. Telegram Bot API. Composio Gmail API. S3/MinIO for file storage.

highlights: **1+ year of stable remote work** in a team: regular delivery, **code review approved on first-second attempt**
Auto-generated TypeScript clients from OpenAPI: **eliminated entire class of errors** in frontend/backend sync
Built PWA with offline mode and push notifications — **app works without internet and installs as native**
Connected LLM providers (OpenAI, Ollama) to production with **fallback strategy and token monitoring**
Built PostgreSQL + MinIO auto-backup system with **encryption and offsite sync**
Claude Code (CLI) as primary AI tool: MCP servers (Serena, Context7, Playwright, Figma), **AI-driven TDD**, custom skills for debugging and code review

methodology.title: Development Methodologies
methodology.text: API-first approach: OpenAPI spec → auto-generated TypeScript clients. TDD for business logic. RDD for feature planning before implementation. TypeScript types from DB schemas.

architecture.title: Architecture & Design
architecture.text: Clean Architecture on NestJS modules. REST API with auto-documentation from decorators. Event-driven approach for loosely coupled components. Structure ready for microservice extraction.

backend.title: Backend (NestJS / TypeScript)
backend.text: NestJS as primary stack. JWT auth with refresh tokens. Background jobs and scheduled tasks. LLM providers (OpenAI, Ollama) with fallback strategy and token monitoring. Telegram Bot integration.

frontend.title: Frontend (React / TypeScript)
frontend.text: Next.js PWA with offline mode and push notifications. Zustand + SWR for state management. React Hook Form + Zod for validation. Component library in Storybook. i18n and theming.

ai.title: AI Tools
ai.text: Claude Code (CLI) for code review, debugging and refactoring. MCP servers: Context7 (docs), Playwright MCP (E2E), Figma MCP (design). TypeScript language server for code intelligence. Custom skills.

devops.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
devops.text: Docker + Docker Compose, multi-stage builds. Auto-backups PostgreSQL + MinIO with encryption and offsite sync. CI/CD in GitHub Actions, Dependabot. Observability: Prometheus, Grafana, Loki.

testing.title: Testing
testing.text: Jest unit tests for TypeScript/Node.js. E2E with Playwright. Mocking for LLM providers and external services. Tests integrated in CI/CD: PRs don't merge without green matrix.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.text: LLM providers (OpenAI, Ollama) with fallback and monitoring. Telegram Bot API. S3/MinIO for storage and backups. Composio Gmail API for notifications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.freshness_notice: Projects evolve faster than this resume gets updated. Check the GitHub repos for the latest code.

academic_secretary.name: Academic Secretary IS
academic_secretary.description: Modular monolith on Go: DDD + Clean Architecture, encapsulated domains. In-memory EventBus with Kafka abstraction. CQRS + Event Sourcing + Repository + Unit of Work. 22 PostgreSQL 17 SQL migrations.

features.architecture: Modular monolith on Go: DDD + Clean Architecture, CQRS, Event Sourcing, Repository + Unit of Work. In-memory EventBus with Kafka abstraction. gRPC interfaces. 22 PostgreSQL 17 SQL migrations with versioning and rollback
features.backend: Gin: middleware chains, correlation IDs. OAuth 2.0 + JWT (full security claims, timing-attack prevention, bcrypt cost 14, rate limiting 5 req/15 min, 6 security headers). WebSocket chats. Predictive analytics. Composio Gmail API + Telegram Bot. 1C ERP integration. i18n ru/en/fr/ar with RTL
features.devops: Prometheus + Grafana (latency/error rate/throughput). Loki + Promtail (JSON logs). Grafana Tempo + OpenTelemetry (distributed tracing). Telegram alerts: CPU/RAM/Disk/API errors/backup. Docker + Docker Swarm. GitHub Actions CI/CD. Nginx + CloudFlare. Auto-backups PostgreSQL & MinIO with encryption
features.testing: testify unit tests (Go), k6 load tests, Playwright E2E. AI-driven TDD: tests before implementation, parallel verification. Documentation: architecture, API reference, deployment, security. GitHub Projects: 40+ Issues. .taskmaster — AI-assisted task management

redis.title: Redis — Performance
redis.decorator: Decorator Pattern: zero changes to business logic. Invalidation by domain events — consistency guaranteed. Redis as session store and background job broker.

floq.name: Floq — AI Sales Assistant
floq.description: Full-stack B2B CRM with AI-powered cold outreach, multi-channel sequences (Email + Telegram + phone), and automated lead qualification. Clean Architecture, DDD, 20 PostgreSQL migrations, 51 API endpoints.

features.architecture: Clean Architecture (handler → usecase → repository → domain), DDD with value objects (LeadStatus, Channel, OutboundStatus), port/adapter interfaces, compile-time interface checks, TxManager for transactions, DTO mapping without json tags in domain layer, 20 SQL migrations (golang-migrate), anti-corruption layers (ProspectReader, LeadCreator)
features.backend: 51 REST API endpoints on Go 1.26 + chi v5, JWT auth (access + refresh tokens), pluggable AI provider (Claude/OpenAI/Groq/Ollama) with runtime switching from DB, SMTP sending via mail.ru/Yandex/Gmail (TLS 465 + STARTTLS 587), IMAP polling for inbound emails (go-imap/v2), Telegram MTProto client (gotd/td) for personal account outreach, built-in email verifier (MX/SMTP probe/disposable filter), 2GIS API parser + website email scraper, AI chat assistant with DB context injection, prompt feedback loop, tracking pixel for open/reply tracking, cron-based follow-up system
features.devops: Docker Compose (PostgreSQL 18 + Redis 8 + Ollama + Backend), GitHub Actions CI/CD (Go build/test + Next.js lint/build), multi-stage Alpine image, OrbStack for local development
features.testing: 130+ unit tests across 16 packages (testify, race detector), coverage: auth (JWT middleware, token generation), AI client (extractJSON, prompt resolution, qualification parsing), email verification, settings DTO mapping, chat system prompt building

lexis.name: Lexis
lexis.description: AI-powered language tutor: Go modular monolith (Clean Architecture, DDD) + Next.js 16 frontend. 4 AI providers, SM-2 spaced repetition, JWT auth with token rotation, PostgreSQL, Redis.

features.architecture: Modular monolith (4 modules: auth, tutor, vocabulary, progress), layered domain → usecase → handler → infra. ProviderRegistry as domain interface. Auto-migrations via golang-migrate with embedded SQL. In-process event bus (pub/sub) for cross-module communication. RFC 7807 Problem Detail errors
features.backend: JWT access/refresh token rotation with reuse detection and user-level blacklist via Redis. 4 AI providers (Claude, GPT-4o, Qwen, Gemini) with SSE streaming. SM-2 spaced repetition for vocabulary. 5 exercise modes (chat, quiz, translate, gap, scramble). Domain-level validation with sentinel errors
features.devops: Docker Compose (PostgreSQL 18, Redis 8). GitHub Actions CI: golangci-lint, go test -race, Next.js build, Playwright e2e. Ldflags version injection. MaxBodySize, RequireJSON, RateLimit (prefix-based, fail-closed for login) middleware
features.testing: 83 unit tests across 12 packages. Gomock for auth service, hand-written mocks for handler tests. Coverage includes: token rotation, SM-2 algorithm, goal progress, handler CRUD, eventbus concurrency, middleware auth. Playwright e2e for auth flow
